title: Xtra Creamy Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A nutty and creamy Brazilian dish featuring turmeric and double-rise-bread, perfect for a low-sodium meal prep dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the chicken broth, heavy cream, turmeric, and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add the cooked chicken, cubed bread, and shredded mozzarella cheese to the bowl and stir until the bread is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a large cazuela and top with chopped fresh parsley.
Cover the cazuela with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the cazuela from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
